title: HNTAS: Existing heat networks - draft technical specifications for Milestone 3A
body: "This draft technical specification for existing heat networks details the requirements and technical obligations to be fulfilled at Milestone 3A as part of the upcoming Heat Network Technical Assurance Scheme (HNTAS).  Milestone 3A involves the production and assessment of the Performance Improvement Plan which is designed to:   show how a Responsible Party intends to improve network performance and reliability to the threshold required to achieve Certification allow HNTAS to gain confidence that this is sufficient and achievable within the required timescales   The document covers the:   technical requirements to be met  performance monitoring requirements to be met  key failures to be avoided evidence requirements to be provided to demonstrate conformity with HNTAS    It is for use by:   heat network operators organisations within the heat network supply chain   This technical specification corresponds to the draft HNTAS assessment procedures for Milestone 3A.  Next steps  We will be requesting feedback on the information in these documents. We will run a change management process in parallel with the HNTAS technical standards consultation which will launch shortly.  We will make final versions of these documents available before the scheme starts.  "
